channel.title: Ebay Beauty Bargains on Deals & Finds

item.title: Beauty & Health Deals: Best Picks Under £19 UK Buy Online
item.description: Find top beauty & health bargains on eBay UK - creams, pads and essentials under £19. Shop smart, compare prices and buy beauty & health online UK today.
